creator: j@uriah.heep.sax.de
text:
As andrew@ugh.net.au wrote:

> When you run adduser it complains that /nonexistent is an invlaid shell.

It's right on this.

> While it is an invalid shell adduser used to have an exception for it as
> it was great to give non loginable accounts.

Use /sbin/nologin.

Errrm.  Use it only after adding a `-p' in the first line. :-)

-- 
cheers, J"org

joerg_wunsch@uriah.heep.sax.de -- http://www.sax.de/~joerg/ -- NIC: JW11-RIPE
Never trust an operating system you don't have sources for. ;-)
